[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] '''Jannie Ha'Nook''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Glithnos]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|What possible difference could it mean to me if the relief expedition fails and the Separatists defeat the Republic? If I can't be an ambassador, I can be an ally.|Senator Jannie Ha'Nook planned to be on the winning side of the Clone Wars|<ref name="Jedi Trial" />}}
Known for seeing everything in terms of how it might affect her, Ha'Nook was a ranking member of the [[Security and Intelligence Council]]. Despite her independent bent, she voted in favor of the [[Emergency Powers Act/Legends|Emergency Powers Act]] near the end of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. Before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] begun, she became one of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] advisors in the [[Office of the Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Office of the Supreme Chancellor]].

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the Supreme Chancellor summoned Ha'Nook, Senator [[Shayla Paige-Tarkin]], [[Mas Amedda/Legends|Mas Amedda]], [[Sly Moore]], [[Armand Isard/Legends|Armand Isard]], and [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] to a meeting in his [[Palpatine's apartment|apartment]] to discuss sending a relief expedition to [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]] after the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Battle of Praesitlyn|attacked]] the world. While Ha'Nook was skeptical of the intelligence supplied to them by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Zozridor Slayke]], she was also deeply unnerved by the idea of diverting so many resources to the world without a full vote of the Senate. Because of her resistance, Palpatine ended the meeting to allow all parties to sleep on the thought before delivering a decision.<ref name="Jedi Trial" />

An hour after the meeting, Ha'Nook received a call from a cloaked Sly Moore, who disguised herself using a [[Multispectrum disguise suite|holoshroud]]. Moore, in the guise of Darth Sidious, made an offer to Ha'Nook to install her in the position of [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador plenipotentiary]] to the [[Sluis sector/Legends|Sluis sector]] if she agreed to vote in favor of Palpatine's planned assistance at Praesitlyn. Ha'Nook was influenced by Moore's bribery and [[Mind trick/Legends|Force persuasion]], and agreed to support the Chancellor without calling a vote in the Senate.<ref name="Jedi Trial" />

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the final [[Standard year/Legends|year]] of the war, Senator Ha'Nook, along with [[Janus Greejatus/Legends|Janus Greejatus]], Sly Moore, Sate Pestage, [[Sim Aloo/Legends|Sim Aloo]], Armand Isard, and Vice Chair Mas Amedda, attended a meeting in the [[Chancellor's working office/Legends|Holding Office]] in the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]]. As the overlong meeting ended, they passed by the members of the [[Loyalist Committee/Legends|Loyalist Committee]] as they waited to petition the Chancellor for the end of the [[Enhanced Security and Enforcement Act]].<ref name="Labyrinth">''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''</ref> After the [[Battle of Belderone]], Ha'Nook met with the Chancellor's advisors and the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] to discuss capturing [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] at [[Tythe/Legends|Tythe]]. Ha'Nook, with Sly Moore at her shoulder, again voiced her displeasure at diverting any more troops from the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]], but was overridden by the Chancellor's support for the Jedi Taskforce.<ref name="Reversal of Fortune">''[[Reversal of Fortune]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars Annual 2009]]'', her name is misspelled as "Senator Ha'Nouk".<ref name="Annual">''[[Star Wars Annual 2009]]''</ref>
